title: Vacancy for Teacher at VIT University

jsonLd.title: Vacancy for Teacher at VIT University
jsonLd.description:
An exciting career opportunity awaits you at VIT University. We are on the lookout for a dedicated Teacher to strengthen our Dhanbad-based team.

About VIT University:
VIT University is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Design formative and summative assessments aligned to learning objectives
• Monitor student progress and provide timely feedback
• Participate in school events, workshops, and training programs
• Participate in teacher training and professional development programs
• Contribute to school newsletter, blogs, and other publications
• Utilize technology and digital tools to enhance learning outcomes
• Develop and deliver engaging lesson plans for students

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• CA / CMA / CFA certification
• 3-6 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Data Analysis
• Proficiency in LMS Platforms
• Proficiency in Bloom's Taxonomy
• Proficiency in Lesson Planning
• Proficiency in Communication Skills
• Proficiency in CBSE/ICSE Standards
• Proficiency in Zoom/Teams
• Proficiency in Special Education

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Salary Range: 7 LPA - 15 LPA per annum

Location: Dhanbad, Jharkhand, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with VIT University!
